title: centranthus lecoqii var. longicalcaratus
intro: Centranthus lecoqii var. longicalcaratus, also known as the valerian centranthus, is a plant species in the plantain family (Plantaginaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its content of alkaloids, which have been shown to have a sedative and calming effect on the nervous system. The health benefits of Centranthus lecoqii var. longicalcaratus include reducing anxiety and insomnia, improving sleep quality, and alleviating restlessness and irritability. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
